data.body: Address the GitHub Actions deprecation annotation seen during the v0.8.3 Release Runtime Artifact workflow (run 24069981601). The current workflow uses actions that still run on Node.js 20, including actions/checkout@v4, actions/upload-artifact@v4, and softprops/action-gh-release@v2. Expected outcome: update the workflow to use Node 24-compatible action versions or another supported configuration so release builds and asset uploads remain functional without deprecation annotations. Preserve the existing release behavior for linux-arm64, linux-x64, and darwin-arm64 artifacts, and verify the release/runtime workflow still passes after the change.
data.title: Update GitHub Actions off Node 20
